hawkish_phrases: risks to the outlook remained on the downside
risks surrounding the inflation outlook...were tilted to the downside
the need to monitor closely all relevant incoming information
correlation between oil prices and inflation expectations...could be seen as a sign of an unanchoring of inflation expectations
dovish_phrases: downward revisions to the outlook for inflation
inflation was now expected to pick up more slowly than previously expected
downside risks to the September 2015 ECB staff projections for inflation
willingness and ability to act, if warranted, by using all the instruments available within its mandate
asset purchase programme provided sufficient flexibility
summary: The Governing Council held rates unchanged with the APP continuing as planned, but acknowledged clearly increased downside risks to growth and inflation from emerging markets and lower oil prices, while signaling willingness to act if necessary and increasing the PSPP issue share limit to 33%.
